title: Qwen3.5-9B-AWQ: stacked GEMM fusion (decode micro-benchmark)
hardware_note: Single-GPU run; decode forward total is the primary comparable metric.

optimizations.FASTINFERENCE_QWEN35_FUSED_AWQ_AB: Fuse linear_attn in_proj_a + in_proj_b (same K/out) into one PackedInt4/AWQ matmul.
optimizations.FASTINFERENCE_QWEN35_FUSED_AWQ_GATE_UP: Fuse dense MLP gate_proj + up_proj into one matmul; then silu(gate)*up and down_proj.

implementation: vllm/model_executor/models/qwen3_5.py — _qwen35_try_fused_awq_pair_matmul (AWQWeight or PackedInt4Weight stacked along output rows).

results_ms_mean_per_decode_step.method: Same script, 3 runs each after GPU warm; values are decode_forward_total_ms (mean per step).

interpretation.primary_metric: decode_forward_total_ms (CUDA event timers around full forward).
interpretation.hook_buckets_note: When gate+up are fused, gate_proj/up_proj forward hooks no longer fire; fused GEMM time remains inside per-layer hooks. Therefore linear-attn path and MLP hook sub-sums are not directly comparable across modes — use decode_forward_total_ms for A/B.
